school_admin.title: Setup Wizard
school_admin.summary: Use this guided flow to finish first-time school setup before handing the app to staff.
steps: Complete school profile, branding, class subjects, teachers, students, and assignments.
Use the suggested next step buttons instead of jumping randomly.
Finish only after the required setup checks are complete.

school_admin.title: Teacher Assignments
school_admin.summary: Use this page to assign class teachers for all classes and subject teachers only for JSS/SS secondary classes.
steps: Assign one class teacher for each Nursery/Primary/JSS/SS class.
Use subject-teacher assignment only for JSS/SS classes.
For Nursery/Primary, the class teacher handles all offered subjects.
Check current assignments below before adding a new one.

school_admin.title: Teachers
school_admin.summary: Use this page to review teacher records, current assignments, and archive/restore status.
steps: Search the teacher list before adding a duplicate.
Review class and subject assignment columns.
Archive inactive teachers instead of deleting records.

school_admin.title: Teacher Workload
school_admin.summary: Use this page to compare teacher class and subject load for the current term.
steps: Review class count and subject count per teacher.
Check conflict warnings before publishing results.
Adjust assignments if one teacher has too many responsibilities.

school_admin.title: Class Subjects
school_admin.summary: Use this page to configure subjects available for Nursery, Primary, JSS, and SS classes.
steps: Pick the class name exactly, such as Primary1, Primary2A, JSS1, or SS1.
For Nursery/Primary, save the Subjects Offered list.
For SS, configure stream subjects where needed.
Return to Teacher Assignments after saving subjects.

school_admin.title: Add Students
school_admin.summary: Use this page to add students manually or through CSV into a specific class and term.
steps: Choose the class and term first.
Add names manually or import rows in bulk.
Review validation messages and the saved class list below.

school_admin.title: View Students
school_admin.summary: Use this page to search, filter, correct, archive, restore, and reset student records.
steps: Filter by class or term before taking action.
Open a student row to view result or correction options.
Use archive/restore for lifecycle changes and reset password only when needed.

school_admin.title: Parents
school_admin.summary: Use this page to review linked parent records and parent-student access relationships.
steps: Search by parent contact or student name.
Confirm linked children before troubleshooting parent login.
Update parent links through supported correction actions.

school_admin.title: Messages
school_admin.summary: Use this page to compose and track official notices for teachers, students, and parents.
steps: Select audience scope first: all, class, stream, subject, or class-subject.
Write a clear title and action-focused message.
Attach files only when useful and monitor delivery/read status.

school_admin.title: Timetable
school_admin.summary: Use this page to create or import class timetable rows and verify schedule conflicts.
steps: Select the class, day, period, subject, time, and room.
For Nursery/Primary, timetable teacher resolves from class teacher assignment.
For JSS/SS, timetable teacher resolves from subject assignment unless dean-led mode is active.
Use CSV template for bulk import and fix conflict warnings.

school_admin.title: New Term Wizard
school_admin.summary: Use this page to move into a new term/year while copying or validating assignments safely.
steps: Confirm old and new term/year before applying changes.
Copy needed class/subject assignments and timetable context.
Verify students, locks, and alerts after the switch.

school_admin.title: Term Programs
school_admin.summary: Use this page to manage school events, term dates, reminders, parent visibility, and calendar export.
steps: Add event title, dates, and audience visibility.
Use reminders for important deadlines.
Print or export ICS when families need offline calendars.

school_admin.title: Promote Students
school_admin.summary: Use this page to move students through Nursery, Primary, JSS, SS, repeat, or remove workflows.
steps: Select source class and suggested target class.
Review each student action: promote, repeat, or remove.
Run promotion after result and attendance checks are complete.

school_admin.title: Promotion Audit
school_admin.summary: Use this page to review promotion history, who moved, from which class, and when.
steps: Filter by class, term, year, or action.
Review audit rows before running another promotion.
Use the log to verify accidental movement claims.

school_admin.title: Publish Results
school_admin.summary: Use this page to review class submissions, approve or reject results, publish, unpublish, and manage correction locks.
steps: Select class, term, and academic year.
Resolve missing scores, attendance gaps, and assignment warnings.
Approve/reject submitted results, then publish when ready.
Use unlock/relock only for controlled corrections.

school_admin.title: Subject Requests
school_admin.summary: Use this page to approve or reject student requests to add or drop subjects.
steps: Filter pending requests first.
Review student, class, requested subject, and reason.
Approve or reject, then verify student subject list.

school_admin.title: CBT Manager
school_admin.summary: Use this page to create CBT tests, add questions, publish, monitor attempts, and retrieve results.
steps: Choose class, subject, term, and academic year.
Create the test, then add questions and set status.
Open monitor/results once students start submitting.

school_admin.title: Analytics
school_admin.summary: Use this page to review academic performance, attendance impact, assistant usage, and operational trends.
steps: Set term/year filters before reading metrics.
Compare pass rate, subject trends, and attendance summaries.
Use assistant analytics to improve help content.

school_admin.title: Data Integrity
school_admin.summary: Use this page to find inconsistent records, orphan assignments, user links, and class-subject mismatch issues.
steps: Run checks for the current term/year.
Fix high-severity issues first.
Re-run checks to confirm the data is clean.

school_admin.title: Score Audit
school_admin.summary: Use this page to inspect score change history and revert eligible changes when policy allows.
steps: Filter by student, class, subject, term, or editor.
Review source, old value, new value, and reason.
Use revert carefully and verify result output after.

school_admin.title: Result Disputes
school_admin.summary: Use this page to review and resolve parent/student complaints about published results.
steps: Open dispute details and supporting context.
Investigate score, publication, or correction history.
Update status and resolution note after action.

school_admin.title: Attendance Summary
school_admin.summary: Use this page to review attendance totals by class and export attendance summary data.
steps: Filter by term and academic year.
Compare present, absent, late, and excused counts.
Export CSV when records need external review.

school_admin.title: Bulk Tools
school_admin.summary: Use this page for CSV/Excel import/export, backups, restore dry-run, and storage monitoring.
steps: Export a backup before bulk imports.
Use dry-run mode first to validate file quality.
Download import error reports and fix rejected rows.

school_admin.title: Security
school_admin.summary: Use this page to review access controls, security logs, password practices, and operational restrictions.
steps: Review suspicious login or access activity.
Apply password or account controls where needed.
Escalate global platform controls to super admin.

school_admin.title: System Health
school_admin.summary: Use this page to check database, queue, backup, storage, and service readiness for the school.
steps: Review failed health checks first.
Check backup and storage status.
Use recovery drill for deeper restore-readiness verification.

school_admin.title: Recovery Drill
school_admin.summary: Use this page to test whether backups and critical records are recoverable before an emergency.
steps: Run drill when the system is stable.
Review failed sections and missing backup evidence.
Repeat after fixing backup or restore issues.

school_admin.title: School Privacy Requests
school_admin.summary: Use this page to review user data/privacy requests before super-admin final action.
steps: Filter pending requests.
Approve or reject with a clear school review note.
Approved rows move to super admin for final resolution.

school_admin.title: School Settings
school_admin.summary: Use this page to edit school profile, term/year, grading, operation flags, theme, and logo/signature setup.
steps: Update school profile and academic context carefully.
Configure result grading, ranking, and exam structure.
Save and refresh the dashboard to confirm changes.

teacher.title: Teacher Dashboard
teacher.summary: Use this page to manage score, attendance, messages, and assignment workflows for your current assignment scope.
steps: Confirm term/year and assigned class-subject scope.
For Nursery/Primary class-teacher scope, handle all class subjects.
For JSS/SS subject scope, handle only assigned subjects.
Open the relevant task card for scores, attendance, CBT, or messages.

teacher.title: Class List
teacher.summary: Use this page to view students in class-teacher scope and students offering your assigned subjects.
steps: Check scope/status tags before taking action.
Open score actions only for eligible students.
Use the list to identify pending score-entry work quickly.

teacher.title: Enter Scores
teacher.summary: Use this page to enter or update results within your assignment scope. Nursery/Primary class teachers can enter all subjects for their class.
steps: Select the correct class, student, term, and year.
For Nursery/Primary class-teacher scope, enter all offered subjects.
For JSS/SS subject-teacher scope, enter only assigned subjects.
Validate CA/exam entries before save.

teacher.title: Subject Score Sheet
teacher.summary: Use this page to enter one subject for many students in an assigned class-subject scope.
steps: Choose class, subject, and term.
Enter CA/exam rows for eligible students.
Submit when the subject sheet is complete.

teacher.title: Upload CSV
teacher.summary: Use this page to upload score CSV files for assigned classes or subjects.
steps: Download or follow the expected CSV format.
Upload only rows within your assignment scope.
Fix rejected rows and upload again if validation fails.

teacher.title: Teacher Notifications
teacher.summary: Use this page to review missing-score alerts and pending-entry counts for your current scope.
steps: Review each alert row by class and subject.
Open Enter Scores or Subject Score Sheet to complete pending entries.
Return to confirm alert count has reduced.

teacher.title: Attendance
teacher.summary: Use this page to mark attendance for your class-teacher scope only.
steps: Pick the class and instructional date.
Mark every student present, absent, late, or excused.
Save and review the summary after submission.

teacher.title: Period Attendance
teacher.summary: Use this page to mark attendance by class, date, period, and subject where allowed.
steps: Select class, date, period, and subject.
Mark each student status.
Save and verify the period summary.

teacher.title: Behaviour Assessment
teacher.summary: Use this page to record behaviour traits for students in class-teacher scope.
steps: Select the assigned class.
Complete required behaviour fields.
Save before result publish checks.

teacher.title: Teacher Messages
teacher.summary: Use this page to read school notices and mark them as read.
steps: Read the latest unread notices first.
Use mark-read or mark-all-read when finished.
Open linked instructions if a notice asks for action.

teacher.title: Teacher Timetable
teacher.summary: Use this page to view teaching periods by class, day, time, subject, and room.
steps: Review today and week schedule.
Use period information for lesson planning and attendance.
Report missing or wrong periods to school admin.

teacher.title: Teacher CBT
teacher.summary: Use this page to create CBT tests and questions only for your assigned class and subject scope.
steps: Pick the assigned class and subject.
Create the test first, then add questions.
Publish only after questions are complete.

teacher.title: Subject Comments
teacher.summary: Use this page to review or manage subject-teacher comments within assignment scope.
steps: Filter by class, subject, term, and year.
Review comments alongside student details.
Use comments for handover or result review.

teacher.title: Subject Ranks
teacher.summary: Use this page to review subject ranking history and export ranked sheets.
steps: Choose year, term, class, and subject.
Review ranked students and trends.
Export rank CSV when needed.

parent.title: Parent Dashboard
parent.summary: Use this page to switch between linked children and open result, attendance, timetable, messages, and dispute workflows.
steps: Select the correct child first when multiple children are linked.
Open result, attendance, timetable, or messages from the child context.
Submit disputes only for the affected child and term.

parent.title: Parent View Result
parent.summary: Use this page to view a published result for a linked child.
steps: Pick the child and term/year.
Review subject scores, average, grade, and remarks.
Use print/download if available.

parent.title: Compare Results
parent.summary: Use this page to compare a child's academic performance across terms.
steps: Select the child first.
Choose terms/year to compare.
Use trend differences to identify improvement or concern areas.

parent.title: Parent Attendance
parent.summary: Use this page to view attendance records for a linked child.
steps: Select the child and term/date range.
Review present, absent, late, and excused counts.
Contact school if records look wrong.

parent.title: Parent Timetable
parent.summary: Use this page to view child-specific timetable rows filtered by class and offered subjects.
steps: Pick the child first when multiple children are linked.
Review only periods shown for that child's class/subjects.
Use print view if you need an offline copy.

parent.title: Parent Messages
parent.summary: Use this page to read school notices and child-specific messages.
steps: Open unread messages first.
Check deadlines and attachments.
Mark messages read after reviewing.

parent.title: Parent Disputes
parent.summary: Use this page to raise or track result concerns for a linked child.
steps: Choose the affected child, result, and term.
Write a clear complaint with evidence.
Track status until school resolves it.

student.title: Student Dashboard
student.summary: Use this page to view personal notices, result links, messages, and account actions.
steps: Read dashboard notices first.
Open messages or result pages from the sidebar.
Use change password to keep account secure.

student.title: View Result
student.summary: Use this page to review published term results, grades, and verification details.
steps: Confirm the selected term/year context.
Review subject rows and average carefully.
Use print/download where available.

student.title: Student Messages
student.summary: Use this page to review school notices and class/subject-specific messages.
steps: Open unread notices first.
Check assignment or deadline details.
Mark messages as read after reviewing.

student.title: Subject Requests
student.summary: Use this page to request adding or dropping a subject for school-admin approval.
steps: Choose the subject and request action.
Write a short reason.
Track pending, approved, or rejected status.

student.title: Student CBT
student.summary: Use this page to take assigned CBT tests and review available attempts.
steps: Open only active CBTs assigned to your class/subject.
Read instructions and time limit before starting.
Submit before the timer ends.

student.title: Student Profile
student.summary: Use this page to review profile details and request support for incorrect personal data.
steps: Check name, class, email, and guardian details.
Report wrong details to school admin.
Use password/security actions where available.

super_admin.title: Add School
super_admin.summary: Use this page to create a new school tenant and initial school-admin access.
steps: Enter school identity and admin details.
Choose plan/features carefully.
Confirm admin credentials and school status after creation.

super_admin.title: View Schools
super_admin.summary: Use this page to review schools, edit school records, and control operations status.
steps: Search for the school first.
Review status, plan, and operations controls.
Edit carefully and verify school admin access.

super_admin.title: Reported Issues
super_admin.summary: Use this page to review user-submitted support/bug reports.
steps: Filter by unread, role, school, or page.
Open details and use role/page context to reproduce.
Mark read/unread or delete duplicates.

super_admin.title: Privacy Requests
super_admin.summary: Use this page to finalize data/privacy requests after school-admin review.
steps: Filter pending or school-approved rows.
Review school note and requested action.
Approve/reject with resolution note and apply final action where needed.

super_admin.title: Error Logs
super_admin.summary: Use this page to monitor production/runtime errors across schools and roles.
steps: Filter by role, endpoint, or keyword.
Open details to inspect traceback and request context.
Use error UID when coordinating fixes.

super_admin.title: Assistant Analytics
super_admin.summary: Use this page to review assistant quality, unresolved questions, and role-specific patterns.
steps: Review repeated questions and low-confidence topics.
Update app guidance for frequent unresolved workflows.
Use the patterns to improve page help and KB entries.

super_admin.title: Assistant Health
super_admin.summary: Use this endpoint to verify assistant schema, database, and response-engine status.
steps: Open the health JSON from assistant analytics.
Check failed schema/db/engine flags.
Run migrations or fix configuration if checks fail.
